journey.name: Settings Save Flow
journey.description: Verify that changing settings and saving persists values correctly. This tests the save button enablement, profile editing, and persistence. iOS parity: SettingsTests save flow, unit system switch, theme persistence

actions.action: Tap the settings gear icon in the top-right corner of the dashboard
Verify the "Save" button is initially disabled
Scroll down to find the "Target Calories" field
Verify the Target Calories field now contains a numeric value
Verify the "Save" button is now enabled
Verify the hero card "Goal" value has updated to match the calculated target
